import me from "./photo.png" const About = () => { return ( <>

I'm currently studying management and computer science, with a focus on machine learning and backend development. I enjoy building intelligent systems, APIs, and scalable applications that solve real-world problems.

What I like to do

- Machine learning models
- Dockerized APIs
- AI-powered applications
- Create something really used after and not only here to keep busy myself

What am I currently doing

- Learning Java & advanced backend concepts
- Working on ML projects with PyTorch
- Exploring cloud & DevOps

) } export default About;
